creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #50)
> (In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #49)
> 
> > If there's no objection, I'd like to commit it to qt4-moc and remove all
> > patches added in the revisions above that wrap Boost includes within #ifndef
> > Q_MOC_RUN blocks.
> 
> I'm ok with that, however it'll require an exp-run.

Do you mean an exp-run with the existing ports tree and Boost 1.55 or another exp-run by truckman@ with a tree using Boost 1.60?
